title: Product Analyst
required_skills: Extensive Business Analyst experience within a financial institution
Strong hands-on Murex experience (full lifecycle implementations)
In-depth expertise in at least two Murex functional domains (FX, Rates, Fixed Income, Equities, Commodities)
Cross-functional banking process knowledge (Front Office, Risk, Finance, Operations)
Experience planning and executing test strategies and campaigns
matched_skills: Project management (Scrum, SAFe) — partial alignment with structured sprint/milestone delivery
Cross-functional stakeholder coordination — partial via HSBC PMO and Hapag-Lloyd roles
Financial analytics — partial via HSBC USD 8M programme work
Data quality QA — partial alignment with test/validation activities
missing_skills: Capital markets / financial institution BA experience
Murex-specific: product configuration, pricing, P&L attribution, market data templates, GOM setup
Large-scale system consolidation and migration experience
Banking Front Office / Risk / Finance process knowledge
core_responsibilities: Lead design workshops and show-and-tell sessions with business stakeholders and Murex teams
Translate business requirements into clear functional specifications for Murex implementations
Perform gap analysis between business needs and standard Murex capabilities; define configurations and extensions
Oversee full project lifecycle from initiation to go-live, managing sprints and milestones
Monitor project progress, timelines, and risks with transparent stakeholder communication
recommended_emphasis: Stakeholder management and cross-functional coordination skills
Project lifecycle oversight experience (HSBC PMO, Hapag-Lloyd)
Structured analytical approach to business requirements

company_info.size_raw: global team of more than 20,000 professionals
